name: soundcloud-v2

metadata.name: soundcloud-v2
metadata.summary: Python wrapper for the internal v2 SoundCloud API.Does not require an API key.

documentation:
# soundcloud.py

[![Tests](https://github.com/7x11x13/soundcloud.py/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/7x11x13/soundcloud.py/actions/workflows/ci.yml)
[![Coverage Status](https://coveralls.io/repos/github/7x11x13/soundcloud.py/badge.svg?branch=main)](https://coveralls.io/github/7x11x13/soundcloud.py?branch=main)
[![Supported Python Versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/python-3.7%2C%203.8%2C%203.9%2C%203.10%2C%203.11%2C%203.12-blue.svg)](https://pypi.org/project/soundcloud-v2/)
[![Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/soundcloud-v2.svg)](https://pypi.org/project/soundcloud-v2/)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/pypi/l/soundcloud-v2.svg)](https://pypi.org/project/soundcloud-v2/)
[![Monthly Downloads](https://pepy.tech/badge/soundcloud-v2/month)](https://pepy.tech/project/soundcloud-v2)

Python wrapper for some of the internal v2 SoundCloud API (read/GET only methods). Does not require an API key.

### NOTE: This is NOT the official [SoundCloud developer API](https://developers.soundcloud.com/docs/api/guide)

SoundCloud is not accepting any more application registration requests [^1] so
I made this library so developers can use SoundCloud's internal API for their projects.


[^1]: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfNxc82RJuzC0DnISat7n4H-G7IsPQIdaMpe202iiHZEoso9w/closedform

## Documentation

https://7x11x13.xyz/soundcloud.py

## Installation

```bash
pip install soundcloud-v2
```

## Example

```python
from soundcloud import SoundCloud

sc = SoundCloud(auth_token="auth_token")
assert sc.is_client_id_valid()
assert sc.is_auth_token_valid()
me = sc.get_user_by_username("7x11x13")
assert me.permalink == "7x11x13"
```

## Notes on `auth_token`
Some methods require authentication in the form of an OAuth2 access token.
You can find your token in your browser cookies for SoundCloud under the name "oauth_token".
A new token will be generated each time you log out and log back in.

## Notes on `**kwargs`
All API methods have a `**kwargs` argument which you can use to pass extra, undocumented
arguments to the SoundCloud v2 API in case I missed some parameter which you find useful.
If this is the case, feel free to create an issue or pull request to document the missing
argument.

## License
[MIT](https://choosealicense.com/licenses/mit/)

class_variables.name: soundcloud.resource.graphql.CommentWithInteractions.liked_by_creator
documentation: Whether comment was liked by the track creator

class_variables.name: soundcloud.resource.graphql.CommentWithInteractions.liked_by_user
documentation: Whether the current logged in user liked the comment

classes.name: soundcloud.resource.playlist.AlbumPlaylist
documentation: Playlist or album with full user info

classes.name: soundcloud.resource.playlist.BasicAlbumPlaylist
documentation: Playlist or album with partial user info

classes.name: soundcloud.resource.playlist.AlbumPlaylistNoTracks
documentation: Playlist or album with no track info

classes.name: soundcloud.resource.user.UserEmail
documentation: Email address associated with a user

classes.name: soundcloud.resource.download.OriginalDownload
documentation: Contains a download link for a track

classes.name: soundcloud.resource.response.NoContentResponse
documentation: Response with no content, mainly for DELETE requests

classes.name: soundcloud.exceptions.ClientIDGenerationError
documentation: Raised when a client ID could not be dynamically generated.

classes.name: soundcloud.resource.stream.PlaylistStreamItem
documentation: Album or playlist post in user's feed

classes.name: soundcloud.resource.stream.PlaylistStreamRepostItem
documentation: Album or playlist repost in user's feed

# soundcloud.py

[![Tests](https://github.com/7x11x13/soundcloud.py/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/7x11x13/soundcloud.py/actions/workflows/ci.yml)
[![Coverage Status](https://coveralls.io/repos/github/7x11x13/soundcloud.py/badge.svg?branch=main)](https://coveralls.io/github/7x11x13/soundcloud.py?branch=main)
[![Supported Python Versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/python-3.7%2C%203.8%2C%203.9%2C%203.10%2C%203.11%2C%203.12-blue.svg)](https://pypi.org/project/soundcloud-v2/)
[![Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/soundcloud-v2.svg)](https://pypi.org/project/soundcloud-v2/)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/pypi/l/soundcloud-v2.svg)](https://pypi.org/project/soundcloud-v2/)
[![Monthly Downloads](https://pepy.tech/badge/soundcloud-v2/month)](https://pepy.tech/project/soundcloud-v2)

Python wrapper for some of the internal v2 SoundCloud API (read/GET only methods). Does not require an API key.

### Note: This is NOT the official [SoundCloud developer API](https://developers.soundcloud.com/docs/api/guide)

SoundCloud is not accepting any more application registration requests [^1] so
I made this library so developers can use SoundCloud's internal API for their projects.


[^1]: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfNxc82RJuzC0DnISat7n4H-G7IsPQIdaMpe202iiHZEoso9w/closedform

## Installation

```bash
pip install soundcloud-v2
```

## Documentation

https://7x11x13.xyz/soundcloud.py

## Example

```python
from soundcloud import SoundCloud

sc = SoundCloud(auth_token="auth_token")
assert sc.is_client_id_valid()
assert sc.is_auth_token_valid()
me = sc.get_user_by_username("7x11x13")
assert me.permalink == "7x11x13"
```

## Notes on `auth_token`
Some methods require authentication in the form of an OAuth2 access token.
You can find your token in your browser cookies for SoundCloud under the name "oauth_token".
A new token will be generated each time you log out and log back in.

## Notes on `**kwargs`
All API methods have a `**kwargs` argument which you can use to pass extra, undocumented

If this is the case, feel free to create an issue or pull request to document the missing

[MIT](https://choosealicense.com/licenses/mit/)

methods.name: soundcloud.requests.Request.__call__
documentation:
Requests the resource at the given url with
parameters given by kwargs. Converts the resource
to type T and returns it. If the
resource does not exist, returns None

classes.name: soundcloud.requests.CollectionRequest
documentation:
Yields resources from the given url with
parameters given by kwargs. Converts the resources
to type T before yielding

classes.name: soundcloud.requests.ListRequest
documentation:
Requests the resource list at the given url with
parameters given by kwargs. Converts the resources
to type T and returns them.

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.auth_token
documentation: SoundCloud auth token. Only needed for some requests.

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.generate_client_id
documentation:
Generates a SoundCloud client ID

Raises:
    ClientIDGenerationError: Client ID could not be generated.

Returns:
    str: Valid client ID

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.is_client_id_valid
documentation: Checks if current client_id is valid

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.is_auth_token_valid
documentation: Checks if current auth_token is valid

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_me
documentation: Gets the user associated with client's auth token

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_my_history
documentation:
Returns the stream of recently listened tracks
for the client's auth token

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_my_stream
documentation:
Returns the stream of recent uploads/reposts
for the client's auth token

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.resolve
documentation:
Returns the resource at the given URL if it
exists, otherwise return None

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.search
documentation: Search for users, tracks, and playlists

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_tag_tracks_recent
documentation: Get most recent tracks for this tag

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_playlist
documentation:
Returns the playlist with the given playlist_id.
If the ID is invalid, return None

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_playlist_likers
documentation: Get people who liked this playlist

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_playlist_reposters
documentation: Get people who reposted this playlist

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_track
documentation:
Returns the track with the given track_id.
If the ID is invalid, return None

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_tracks
documentation:
Returns the tracks with the given track_ids.
Can be used to get track info for hidden tracks in a hidden playlist.

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_track_albums
documentation: Get albums that this track is in

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_track_playlists
documentation: Get playlists that this track is in

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_track_comments_with_interactions
documentation: Get comments on this track with interaction data. Requires authentication.

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_track_likers
documentation: Get users who liked this track

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_track_reposters
documentation: Get users who reposted this track

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_track_original_download
documentation:
Get track original download link. If track is private,
requires secret token to be provided (last part of secret URL).
Requires authentication.

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_user
documentation:
Returns the user with the given user_id.
If the ID is invalid, return None

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_user_by_username
documentation:
Returns the user with the given username.
If the username is invalid, return None

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_unread_conversations
documentation: Get conversations unread by this user

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_user_emails
documentation: Get user's email addresses. Requires authentication.

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_user_featured_profiles
documentation: Get profiles featured by this user

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_user_following
documentation: Get users this user is following

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_user_related_artists
documentation: Get artists related to this user

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_user_stream
documentation:
Returns generator of track uploaded by given user and
reposts by this user

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_user_tracks
documentation: Get tracks uploaded by this user

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_user_popular_tracks
documentation: Get popular tracks uploaded by this user

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_user_albums
documentation: Get albums uploaded by this user

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_user_playlists
documentation: Get playlists uploaded by this user

methods.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.get_user_links
documentation: Get links in this user's description

class_variables.name: soundcloud.soundcloud.SoundCloud.client_id
documentation: SoundCloud client ID. Needed for all requests.
